title: Dave's Striders
description: Dave (and Dirk) Strider from the hit webcomic Homestuck are invading your Minecraft world and you must defeat them
body:
TG: yeah im legit in minecraft now
TG: you have no clue how awesome this is 
TG: ironically i mean
TG: this is probably the stupidest thing ive ever done

TT: I too am in this texture pack.
